rulings.Case Title: ROSEMARY COURT PROPERTIES LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY VS. WADE TREVOR WALKER et al

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/ Housing Motion Calendar for Wednesday, December 24, 2014 line 1. DEFENDANT TREVOR WALKER's Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Default Judgment OFF CALENDAR, Notice of Appeal filed on December 12, 2014. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: BAY PROPERTY GROUP VS. ABENET TEKIE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Motion For Terminating Sanctions Against Plaintiff Bay Property Group; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Jonathan Bornstein
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/ Housing Motion Calendar for Wednesday, December 24, 2014 line 2. DEFENDANT ARIEL BANTOLILA's Motion For Terminating Sanctions Against Plaintiff Bay Property Group; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Jonathan Bornstein GRANTED in part as follows: Plaintiff shall provide full and complete second set of verified responses by 4:00 p.m. (personal service) on December 24, 2014. Responses shall include facts, not conclusions (e.g. SPROG #4) and specific documents identified by name/bates number (e.g SPROG #3). Additionally, no later than December 26, 2014 by 9:00 a.m. Plaintiff shall file and serve (courtesy copies delivered to Department 501) a response to Defendant's Separate Statement with second set of supplemental responses included. Sufficiency of the second set of supplemental responses may be addressed at December 29, 2014 trial call. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,500. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: BAY PROPERTY GROUP VS. ABENET TEKIE ET AL

Additionally, no later than December 26, 2014 by 9:00 a.m. Plaintiff shall file and serve (courtesy copies delivered to Department 501) a response to Defendant's Separate Statement with second set of supplemental responses included. rulings.Case Title: BARBARA SIMON, AS CONSERVATOR OF THE PERSON VS. DEBORAH WILLIAMS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/ Housing Motion Calendar for Wednesday, December 24, 2014 line 4. DEFENDANTS DEBORAH WILLIAMS and BURON THOMPSON's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer based on termination of employment/termination of license; and sufficiently alleges capacity and standing to sue. Complaint is not uncertain. = (501/RBU)
